title: Provide technical guidance
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Provide technical guidance demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Assist co-workers with their work

pcs.text: Problems arising from previous service and repair work procedures are identified and opportunities for technical guidance are identified1.2 Technical information is sought and interpreted to aid own understanding, as required1.3 Supervisor, team leader or colleague with advanced technical knowledge is identified, and assistance is sought, as required1.4 Technical guidance is provided to co-workers, appropriate to their skill level and need, to assist in determining suitable repair method1.5 Assistance is provided to co-worker during work, to ensure work is completed to manufacturer specifications1.6 Potential faults in co-workers’ work are identified and precautionary steps are taken to prevent them

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Problems arising from previous service and repair work procedures are identified and opportunities for technical guidance are identified1.2 Technical information is sought and interpreted to aid own understanding, as required1.3 Supervisor, team leader or colleague with advanced technical knowledge is identified, and assistance is sought, as required1.4 Technical guidance is provided to co-workers, appropriate to their skill level and need, to assist in determining suitable repair method1.5 Assistance is provided to co-worker during work, to ensure work is completed to manufacturer specifications1.6 Potential faults in co-workers’ work are identified and precautionary steps are taken to prevent them.

elements.title: Provide technical information and instruction to co-workers

pcs.text: Current technical information is communicated to co-workers as it becomes available2.2 Co-workers are instructed how to access, interpret and apply technical information

elements.title: Facilitate continuous learning of self and co-workers

pcs.text: Information is shared to build own and co-workers’ skills3.2 Training opportunities are identified that meet technical and business needs and enhance technical skills of self and co-workers3.3 Approval to take advantage of training opportunities is sought from supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Information is shared to build own and co-workers’ skills3.2 Training opportunities are identified that meet technical and business needs and enhance technical skills of self and co-workers3.3 Approval to take advantage of training opportunities is sought from supervisor?

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
